Premed.Note: Palonosetron 0.5mg/Netupitant 300mg (Akynzeo) p.o. 1h pred chemo, Dexametazón 12mg i.v., Pantoprazol 40mg p.o.

_source: BCCA LUSMEP; eviQ SCLC EP; Horn L et al. NEJM 2018;379:2220 (IMpower133 – atezo+EP)
_revision: 2026-06 | Štandard SCLC: EP q21d. Zvážiť pridanie atezolizumabu (IMpower133) alebo durvalumabu (CASPIAN).
